title: Wholesale sales data: cigarette and fine-cut sales, province and territory, 1980-2014 - Canada.ca
content:
## Wholesale sales data: cigarette and fine-cut sales, province and territory, 1980-2014
Since 2001 tobacco companies have been required by federal law to provide, to Health Canada, annual reports of their wholesale sales of cigarettes, domestic and imported, and fine cut tobacco. These reports are available nationally and provincially for wholesale tobacco sales since 1980.

## Cigarette and fine-cut sales charts 1980-2014
- Cigarette and Fine-cut Sales Charts Canada
- Total Cigarette Sales
- Newfoundland and Labrador
- Northwest Territories
- Prince Edward Island

## Total Cigarette Sales - 2014 Canada - 29,478,234,315
Newfoundland and Labrador
PEI, Northwest Territories, Yukon & Nunavut
